scripts.clean:dist: node -e "const { rmSync } = require('node:fs'); rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @usejunior/docx-comparison && npm run build -w @usejunior/docx-primitives && npm run clean:dist && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.test: npm run build -w @usejunior/docx-comparison && npm run build -w @usejunior/docx-primitives && npm run check:spec-coverage && node ../../node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs
scripts.test:run: npm run build -w @usejunior/docx-comparison && npm run build -w @usejunior/docx-primitives && npm run check:spec-coverage && node ../../node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build -w @usejunior/docx-comparison && npm run build -w @usejunior/docx-primitives && npm run check:spec-coverage && node ../../node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --coverage --coverage.reporter=text-summary --coverage.reporter=json-summary --coverage.reporter=lcov
